description: Water — the RPG Tiles Vector pack's opaque 64px water fill (public/assets/tilemaps/rpg-terrain.png, the cyan cobble-ripple centre block at cols 13-14, rows 0-1). Soft-shaded rippled water authored into the raster at native resolution. The 2×2 field varies the surface instead of repeating one cell. Solid + AnimatedTile so the rail treats it as impassable while the renderer can shimmer it.
